atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right big toe pain and redness.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a two-week history of intermittent right big toe pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that the pain has become more severe and painful last week.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports significant pain and inability to walk at a trade show convention.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports occasionally sharp pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that the pain worsens with movement or prolonged walking.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports walking on his heel to avoid bending the toe.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports taking ibuprofen twice daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Examination reveals a large spur on the top of the right big toe joint.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Examination reveals evidence of cartilage loss.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports feeling bone spurs.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports feeling a grinding sensation in the joint.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has hallux rigidus with significant cartilage loss and a large bony spur, resulting in arthritis of the right big toe joint.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes meloxicam for anti-inflammatory effects, to be taken once daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: We will schedule a follow-up appointment in two weeks to assess the patient's response to treatment.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: If significant improvement is not observed, we will discuss more invasive options, such as a joint injection or surgery to clean out the joint.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient should contact us if he experiences any heartburn or stomach pain.
